title: SOS Task Claimed Message
description: Event emitted when an agent atomically claims a task. Published to the bus so dispatchers and other workers know the task is locked to a specific claimant.

type.description: Message type discriminator. Always 'task.claimed' for this schema.

source.description: Bus address of the agent that claimed the task. Format: 'agent:<name>'.

target.description: Bus channel this message is published to. Defaults to 'sos:channel:tasks'.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which this message was emitted.

version.description: Schema version of this message. SemVer — major.minor or major.minor.patch.

message_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this message instance. UUID v4 recommended.

payload.description: Domain data for the task.claimed event.

task_id.description: Identifier of the task that was claimed. Alphanumeric, underscores, and dashes only.

claimed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which the atomic claim was recorded.

claim_expires_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp after which the claim is considered stale and may be re-issued. Omit for non-expiring claims.

worker_info.description: Optional metadata about the worker that holds the claim.

model.description: Model identifier the worker is running on (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6, gpt-4o).

plan.description: SaaS plan associated with the worker (e.g. starter, growth, scale, enterprise).

estimated_duration_s.description: Worker's estimated time to complete the task, in seconds. Must be a non-negative integer.
